stories.title: Gonçalo Ramos makes clutch header as Portugal rall...
Sources: 76ers, with Brown on board, eye LeBron
stories.summary: One day after trading for Jaylen Brown, the 76ers have entered the mix for LeBron James and are attempting to pitch him, sources said.

stories.title: Sources: Donovan to be lead assistant for Spurs
stories.summary: Billy Donovan has agreed to become the lead assistant coach for San Antonio and head coach Mitch Johnson, sources said.

stories.title: U.S. World Cup win sets domestic ratings record
stories.summary: The U.S.' victory against Bosnia-Herzegovina on Wednesday night was the most-watched soccer telecast in English language history with more than 24.4 million viewers, according to Fox Sports.

stories.title: Sources: Eason, Rockets agree to 5-years, $81.5M
stories.summary: Restricted free agent Tari Eason has agreed to a five-year, $81.5 million deal to return to the Houston Rockets, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Thursday.
